item.title: My wife died two years ago yesterday. I managed to make it all the way through the day without crying.
item.description: Then I watch the last episode of the new season of Futurama this morning and I can't stop. Front page edit.: Thank you all so much for your outpouring of empathy and support....the Imgur community is really like none other I have found.

item.title: My maximalist apartment
item.description:
The living room, where about 75% of my books live. It's cluttered and I do need to move to a larger place (so I can acquire more stuff) but it's comfortable... I intentionally didn't clean up or anything so it's an accurate day-to-day look.
Other view of the living room
Entryway (front door to the right), with my collection of Victorian-era books on natural history and a little gallery wall of oil miniatures. The "bookcase" on the right is actually a vinyl sticker on my closet.
Natural history hallway, with nature on the right and human culture on the left.
Better angle of the nature wall
And the human wall, with bonus artwork from the bedroom.
item.dc:creator: overallpython

item.title: Ordering anything from a Youtube, Facebook, Instagram, or Twitter ad.
item.description: Its insane to me that there is no repercussion for social media sites for knowingly allowing scams to buy ads and scam people.

item.title: Happy New Year from the Possum
item.description: SnarkyJay here— I know I’m early, but I’m gonna be “offline” tomorrow and I wanted to post this before I forgot. I’ve been posting here on Imgur for years, and you guys are honestly such a supportive, welcoming, and funny community that I always appreciate interacting with you folks. Wishing everyone lots of goodness in 2024. Much love.
item.dc:creator: rectalpossum

item.title: Search your feelings. You know it to be true.
item.dc:creator: malbec

item.description:
My yearly new years thing! I skipped 2022. I’m going to be very personal right now. My art accounts have always been a diary for me, but since I’ve been going through a lot of things I’ve been quiet. The amount of shitty people I’ve had to deal with this year is crazy. People who took advantage of me monetarily, emotionally, sexually etc. it really blows my mind how people can suck so hard, how people can really be terrible to you all while smiling in your face and pretending like they didn’t do anything wrong. I won't keep things negative though as i've cried more days this year than not, I'm not going to let anyone hurt me anymore as i go into 2024. I’m so grateful for all the amazing friends that I’ve retained in my life this year, I hope to keep all of them in my life and that we all have a great 2024. Especially my best friend you know who you are bro. All the people I grew close to in 2024 who have looked after me and kept me sane I love and appreciate you very much. My biggest thankyou is to every stranger who has ever complimented my outfit or makeup. You are so real for that!!! Thankyou as well to everyone here who supports my artwork and me. I really really appreciate all the love especially here on Imgur. I read every comment I get on this platform and appreciate every hat stays on comment. If you like my work consider supporting me on my patreon, miaormoa. Or my kofi, https://ko-fi.com/K3K0S2QNB
Old versions of my little new years tradition, I skipped my 2021 and 2022, but I actually started drawing these artworks at 17 years old.
item.dc:creator: miaormoa

item.title: Random Stolen Meme Dumpp
item.description: FP Edit: Thank you and Happy New Year everyone! As always, if you want learn how you can use your CPU/GPU power to help scientists develop new medicines then check out Folding@home: “Install our software to become a citizen scientist and contribute your compute power to help fight global health threats like COVID19, Alzheimer’s Disease, and cancer. Our software is completely free, easy to install, and safe to use.” - foldingathome.org Do your part and join up now!

item.dc:creator: TongueTiedLabourerfromtheLandoftheLittlePeople

item.title: I did the right thing, but I still feel guilty for it
item.description: I had a friend who just was getting a bit much. He kept telling me that he had no interest in me in that way and it was just his autism, but it didnt matter how many times i said no he couldnt accept it. First it was can I come to your flat and be in your bedroom and i said no. And then it would be spun back like 'sorry i didnt mean to make you upset, i have autism and i probably triggered you'. But he would ask every day, like every single day. Even when i reiterated the word no he was always asking to see my bedroom. Then it just got too much like telling me I was beautiful and amazing constantly and that he couldnt believe i would even look at him. Constantly saying things like 'my feelings dont matter, i just want you to be happy'. Then it was asking for hugs all the time and I said no and he'd start apologising and saying it was his autism. It then got to i'd say no and he'd cry and threaten suicide. I always got told 'i will never leave you, my autism makes me care about people too much that i can never leave them' and constantly asking if I would leave him. It crossed a line when I was on a train and I was in the window seat and he just kept trying to hug me ans at one point tried to kiss me and then he burst into tears when i rejected him and told me about his suicide attempt and begged me not to leave him. For someone so adament that we were just friends, it never felt like that. It felt like he was desparate, constantly asking me to care about him and saying he'd do anything for me, saying he was at my house and to come downstairs, calling me beautiful all the time, offering to drop everything tk see me, saying 'i just love to see you smile' I feel so guilty that I just had enough after the incident on the train and i blocked him. I'm scared he'll hurt himself because I left him but it felt like my abusive relationship. If he had said he liked me, then i could have dealt with that like an adult but that was too much. It felt like someone who liked me but was manipulating me to make me think i'm wrong. Maybe I'm vain for thinking that, but it was so intense that I just couldnt. I'm so nervous he'll try to do something but it was so intense for a friendship that apparently 'had zero feelings involved' (which it really didnt feel like). No was just never taken seriously, he'd just say he couldnt accept it because of his autism, and that his disability made him treat people like that. That he couldnt help it if he did something i didnt like, because he didnr understand (despite me saying no 10 times) I appreciate that he has a disability but he did try to force himself on me and cry when i pushed him off and not accept the word no, there was a lot of harassment that made me uncomfortable. I'll delete this later but i just needed to vent. I'm scared I'm bragging if i say i get harassed a lot, but i really hate it and I've had it with it. at the same time I dont want him to hurt himself because I left him, and i cant stop thinking that he might Edit: I genuinrly posted this thinking that it would die in usersub and i'd just delete it this morning. Thank you so much imgur for all the support i got! I woke up this morning and saw all this and honestly I could cry with how heartwarming it is. You guys are just the absolute best, thank you so much!
item.dc:creator: Thecheesymemelord
